mainContent.title: Background
mainContent.textContent: As a voidborn, it is made to adapt to its surroundings, consuming any life and adding its essence into its form. The Rift Herald at one point consumed a Scuttle Crab, taking some of the crabs physical features. It is unclear if there are more than one examples of a rift herald on Runeterra Prime, as such it should be considered as an endling sub-species of voidborn.

mainContent.title: Appearance
mainContent.textContent: The Rift Herald takes on some of the Scuttle Crab's physical features such as the back shell, mandible face area, as well as an affinity to watery areas. Unlike a scuttle crab, it is bipedal, with sharp claws for arms and a long barbed tail. Its body emanates a purple glow common among voidborn.

mainContent.title: Relations
mainContent.textContent: The Rift Herald has no known relations with the Runeterra Prime universe.
